fixtures.notes: Small repo-local fixture for validating the corpus manifest contract.
Small repo-local positive fixture that combines heading, review paragraphs and annotation content in one realistic review memo.
Small repo-local negative fixture that simulates a converter placing a block table inside text:p.
Small repo-local fixture for validating the spreadsheet corpus contract.
Small repo-local fixture for validating the presentation corpus contract.
Small repo-local fixture for validating the drawing corpus contract.
Small repo-local fixture covering ODF 1.4 style:page-layout-properties interleave content in swapped child order.
Small repo-local negative fixture covering duplicate style:columns inside ODF 1.4 style:page-layout-properties interleave content.
Small repo-local fixture covering META-INF/manifest.rdf with pkg:hasPart and pkg:mimeType ontology.
ODF 1.4 / ODF Toolkit Validator parity fixture covering draw:decorative accessibility attribute on style:graphic-properties, unknown to ODF 1.2 schemas.
ODF 1.4 / ODF Toolkit Validator parity fixture covering table:table embedded inside a draw:frame shape, not allowed by ODF 1.2 schemas.
ODF 1.4 / ODF Toolkit Validator parity fixture covering text:start-value="0" on text:list-level-style-number, valid because ODF 1.4 widened the datatype from positiveInteger to nonNegativeInteger.
Small repo-local negative fixture covering an invalid draw:decorative boolean value ("yes" instead of "true"/"false") on style:graphic-properties.
Small repo-local fixture validating against the real ODF 1.1 schema derived from the official OASIS RNG, not the 1.4-filtered approximation.
Small repo-local fixture validating against the real ODF 1.2 schema derived from the official OASIS RNG, not the 1.4-filtered approximation.
Small repo-local fixture validating against the real ODF 1.3 schema derived from the official OASIS RNG, not the 1.4-filtered approximation.

Negative fixture proving the real ODF 1.2 schema is enforced: draw:decorative is an ODF 1.4-only accessibility attribute and must be rejected under the official ODF 1.2 RNG, unlike the previous 1.4-filtered approximation which would have accepted it.
Small repo-local flat XML fixture covering office:formula with MathML content.
